node.statement: STEP: Replace von Neumann entropy S with 2nd Rényi S_2(ρ) = -log Tr(ρ^2), and take annealed average over circuit realizations U, yielding I_c = -log_d E_U[Tr(ρ_B^2)] + log_d E_U[Tr(ρ_{RB}^2)]. Ground truth: main.tex line 141 contains 'Ic=-\log_d\Ex_{U}\Tr(\rho_B^\nreplicas)+\log_d\Ex_{U}\Tr(\rho_{RB}^\nreplicas)' with nreplicas=2.
